mapper.select:
select va.id, va.user_id, va.name, va.phone, va.apartment_id, va.appointment_time, va.additional_info, va.appointment_status, va.is_deleted, ai.id as apartment_id, ai.name as apartment_name, ai.is_deleted as apartment_is_deleted, ai.introduction, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone as apartment_phone, ai.is_release from view_appointment va join apartment_info ai on va.apartment_id = ai.id
and va.is_deleted = 0 and ai.province_id = #{queryVo.provinceId} and ai.city_id = #{queryVo.cityId} and ai.district_id = #{queryVo.districtId} and ai.id = #{queryVo.apartmentId} and va.name like concat('%', #{queryVo.name},'%') and va.name like concat('%', #{queryVo.phone},'%')
